title: Token Risk Analyzer
description: Analyze token risk signals by combining approval data and price history — surface rug-pull indicators, ownership concentration, and volatile price patterns for any ERC-20.
useCase: Build a token safety checker that scores any ERC-20 for rug-pull risk — combine approval data, price history volatility, and holder concentration into a risk score.

keyParams.walletAddress: Wallet holding the token to analyze
